description: Classic four-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting and a refined stacked heel, by arrow for men. Strategic stitch detailing on this narrow derby shoe is a sartorial dream. A minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic Derby, wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Upper Leather upper with a tapering toe box Four-hole central lace-ups Padded leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Branded grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
